entity.label: Shammah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of David’s mighties (2 Sam. 23:25); called also Shammoth (1 Chr. 11:27) and Shamhuth (27:8).

nodes.label: Shammah
nodes.description: One of David’s mighties (2 Sam. 23:25); called also Shammoth (1 Chr. 11:27) and Shamhuth (27:8).

verses.text: Shammah the Harodite, Elika the Harodite,
Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,
